Project 1.Title: Agentic AI Travel Booking Assistant
Project 1.Description: Expanded an Agentic AI-based travel booking assistant that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents to understand user queries and automate travel-related tasks. Planned multi-step reasoning workflows to handle itinerary planning, travel recommendations, and contextual decision-making using tool-integrated AI systems.

Project 2.Title: AI-Powered Workflow Automation using LangGraph and LangChain
Project 2.Description: Created and implemented customized AI workflows using LangChain and LangGraph for building modular and scalable AI applications. Expanded multi-agent and orchestrated workflow pipelines to automate complex task execution, improve decision-making processes, and enhance conversational AI capabilities.

Project 3.Title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Question Answering System
Project 3.Description: Enhanced a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based question answering system that processes documents from local directories, generates embeddings, and stores them in a vector database. Executed semantic search to retrieve relevant context and integrated Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate accurate, context-aware responses.

Project 4.Title: AI Driven AutoML Pipeline
Project 4.Description: Engineered an systematized ML pipeline reducing model training time by 70%; evaluated 8+ algorithms with hyperparameter tuning using Python and Scikit-learn to select optimal models automatically.

Project 5.Title: Malicious DNS Traffic Detection using Deep Learning
Project 5.Description: Built a deep learning classification system achieving 94% accuracy in detecting malicious DNS traffic across 100,000+ records using feature engineering and cybersecurity techniques.

Project 6.Title: Python Data Ingestion and SQL Automation
Project 6.Description: mechanized end-to-end data ingestion and SQL schema creation, cutting manual database setup time by 80% and processing 20+ external data sources using Python ETL pipelines.

Project 7.Title: Obstacle Detection using Ultrasonic Sensor
Project 7.Description: Applied a real-time obstacle detection system using Arduino and ultrasonic sensors with 98% detection accuracy within a 4-meter range for autonomous navigation applications.

Project 8.Title: Gas and Smoke Detection System with GSM Alerts
Project 8.Description: Constructed an IoT safety system detecting gas leaks and triggering SMS alerts via GSM within 3 seconds of threshold breach, covering 5 sensor zones using embedded systems.
